labels.shortDescription: Canada recall code valid for AEM/Repair

labels.value: This vehicle was originally sold in Canada. This vehicle is eligible to receive the approved emissions modification (AEM). This vehicle is also eligible for an extended warranty after (1) the successful installation of the AEM and (2) the vehicle has been registered with FCA US LLC by providing proof of state registration, proof of ownership or lease, and the current mileage/kilometers on the vehicle. Please call 1-833-280-4748 to register your vehicle with FCA and schedule an appointment to have the AEM installed.

labels.shortDescription: Error message when no case was found for claim tracking
labels.value: No records found. Please enter a valid Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) and Claim Number.
This is not a valid status transition.

labels.shortDescription: Claim Status Cant Change Error Message
labels.value: Claim status cannot be changed to any previous status.

labels.shortDescription: Claim status - Claim Under Review for Completeness

labels.value:
Claim Successfully Submitted
Claim Number: [CASE NUMBER]

Your claim has been successfully submitted and will now be reviewed to make sure it is complete. We will email, call or write to you if we need any further information. Once we confirm your submission is complete, we will determine your eligibility.

You can check back here: [COMMUNITY URL STATUS CHECK] to see the status of your claim. Your claim number is [CASE NUMBER]. You will need this number to check the status of your claim. This message has also been emailed to you.

Please be sure to add ecodieselclaims@cac.stellantis.com to your email whitelist to prevent settlement email updates from being sent to your spam folder.

If you have additional questions about the status of your claim or about the claims process, please visit www.EcoDieselSettlement.com or call 1-833-280-4748.

labels.shortDescription: Error message VIN current owner already paid
labels.value: Fiat Chrysler has already processed a claim for the [YEAR MAKE MODEL] EcoDiesel vehicle with VIN [VIN]. If you believe you have received this message in error, please call 1-833-280-4748 for additional assistance.

Your claim has been successfully submitted. However, due to a system error, your supporting documentation was not uploaded. We have sent you an email with details and instructions on submitting your supporting documentation. Please respond to the email, attaching all of your supporting documentation. As a reminder, you may only submit one file for each required document type and the files must be in an acceptable format. (Acceptable file formats are .bmp, .gif, .jpg, .png and .pdf. Files may not exceed 25 MB per file.) Your claim will not be reviewed until you submit your supporting documentation by email.
Claim has been successfully submitted. However, due to a system error, supporting documentation was not uploaded. Please upload documents from Case details page.

labels.shortDescription: Error message for Child case on Track a claim screen
labels.value: Duplicate cases were created for this VIN, please contact Customer Care at 1-833-280-4748 for further information, or if you have received an alternative claim number, you may use that number to track your claim.
This file exceeds 25 MB. Please submit a file size no larger than 25 MB.
This file format is not acceptable. Please submit a .bmp, .gif, .jpg, .png, or .pdf.

labels.shortDescription: Agent Confirmation msg:Former Owner/Lessee on Claim Submission after expiry days
labels.value: You are creating former owner/lessee claim but the former owner/lessee claim creation date is already passed. Do you still want to continue?
There are many issue with your claim.
Since this is not V08 vehicle, Eco Diesel option is not available.

labels.shortDescription: Note for Status of Ownership or lease
labels.value: If you no longer own or lease the vehicle, but received the Approved Emissions Modification (“AEM”) before transferring ownership or ending your lease (including if the vehicle was totaled after receiving the AEM), please select the option that applied to you at the time the AEM was installed.

labels.shortDescription: Error message VIN prev owner/lesse already paid
labels.value: Fiat Chrysler has already processed a claim for the [YEAR MAKE MODEL] EcoDiesel vehicle with VIN [VIN]. If you believe you have received this message in error, please call 1-833-280-4748 for additional assistance.

labels.shortDescription: Time period for Prev Owner or Lesse has expired.
labels.value: The time period for claim submissions for eligible former owners and eligible former lessees ended on August 1,2019. If you believe you have received this message in error, or if you recently returned your leased vehicle under the terms of the lease or your vehicle was recently totaled before getting the Approved Emissions Modification, please call 1-833-280-4748 for additional assistance.

The EcoDiesel Settlement Claims Portal is temporarily unavailable.
We’re working to resolve the issue as soon as possible. Please try accessing the portal again later.
If you have questions about the claims process, please review the claims process description and video or the FAQs on www.EcoDieselSettlement.com.

labels.shortDescription: US recall code valid for claim

labels.value: This vehicle is not part of the settlement program. If you believe you have received this message in error, please try re-entering the VIN or calling 1-833-280-4748 for additional assistance.

labels.shortDescription: Message when VIN is not found in vehicle search.
labels.value:
This is an invalid Vehicle Identification Number(VIN).
If you believe you have received this message in error, please try re-entering the VIN or calling 1-833-280-4748 for additional assistance.

labels.shortDescription: Current Owner - Vin Eligible Message Part 1
labels.value:
This [YEAR MAKE MODEL] EcoDiesel vehicle is part of the settlement program.

Your eligibility to receive compensation depends on whether you meet the criteria described in the court approved settlement documents, which are available at EcoDieselSettlement.com. If you are eligible for the settlement, you must complete the following to receive compensation:

(1) submit the required information and documents;

(2) submit a signed oﬀer letter and signed and notarized release to Fiat Chrysler; and

(3) have the Approved Emissions Modification (“AEM”) installed in your vehicle.

IMPORTANT: Before submitting a claim, please read the Class Long Form Notice

labels.shortDescription: Current Owner - Message 2 - Vin Eligible message Part 2
labels.value:
(3) Proof that you purchased your vehicle and when (which may include your bill of sale, title, registration from time of purchase, DMV registration history, financing agreement, or insurance documentation listing your date of vehicle purchase).

Please make sure that the scanned copy or photograph of your supporting documentation is clear and complete. If a document contains multiple pages, you must combine those pages into a single file (for example, if your bill of sale is three pages long, you must save all three pages as one combined file).

The acceptable file formats are .bmp, .gif, .jpg, .png, and .pdf, and your file size must not exceed 25 MB per document.

Once you have gathered your documents, you will need to upload the documents into the correct upload slot corresponding to each of the three document categories listed above. You will be able to upload only one file per document category.

labels.shortDescription: Current Lessee - Message 2 - Vin Eligible message Part 1
labels.value:
BEFORE PROCEEDING, PLEASE MAKE SURE YOU HAVE THE REQUIRED INFORMATION AND DOCUMENTS AVAILABLE AND READY FOR UPLOAD

As a current lessee, in addition to your name and contact information, please have the following information and documents ready before proceeding:

Information
Date that you began leasing your vehicle
Names of any co-lessees (if applicable)

Documents
You will need to upload a scanned copy or photograph of the following supporting documentation to complete your claim:

(1) Your driver’s license or other government-issued photo identification.
Please note: federal government employee IDs, military IDs, and military dependent IDs are not acceptable and should not be uploaded.

(2) Your current vehicle registration.

labels.shortDescription: Current Lessee - Message 2 - Vin Eligible message Part 2
labels.value:
(3) Proof that you lease your vehicle (such as your lease agreement or proof of a monthly lease payment).

Please make sure that the scanned copy or photograph of your supporting documentation is clear and complete. If a document contains multiple pages, you must combine those pages into a single file (for example, if your lease agreement is three pages long, you must save all three pages as one combined file).

The acceptable file formats are .bmp, .gif, .jpg, .png, and .pdf, and your file size must not exceed 25 MB per document.

Once you have gathered your documents, you will need to upload the documents into the correct upload slot corresponding to each of the three document categories listed above. You will be able to upload only one file per document category.

labels.shortDescription: Former Owner - Message 2 - Vin Eligible message Part 1
labels.value:
BEFORE PROCEEDING, PLEASE MAKE SURE YOU HAVE THE REQUIRED INFORMATION AND DOCUMENTS AVAILABLE AND READY FOR UPLOAD

As a former owner, in addition to your name and contact information, please have the following information and documents ready before proceeding:

Information
Date that you purchased and sold your vehicle
Names of any co-owners (if applicable)

Documents
You will need to upload a scanned copy or photograph of the following supporting documentation to complete your claim:

(1) Your driver’s license or other government-issued photo identification.
Please note: federal government employee IDs, military IDs, and military dependent IDs are not acceptable and should not be uploaded.

(2) Proof that you purchased the vehicle and when (which may include your bill of sale, title, registration from time of purchase, DMV registration history, financing agreement,

labels.shortDescription: Former Owner - Message 2 - Vin Eligible message Part 2
labels.value:
or insurance documentation listing your date of vehicle purchase).

(3) Proof of when you sold or transferred title to the vehicle (which may include a bill of sale, copy of title transfer, trade-in receipt, or insurance transfer document).

Please make sure that the scanned copy or photograph of your supporting documentation is clear and complete. If a document contains multiple pages, you must combine those pages into a single file (for example, if your bill of sale is three pages long, you must save all three pages as one combined file).

The acceptable file formats are .bmp, .gif, .jpg, .png, and .pdf, and your file size must not exceed 25 MB per document.

Once you have gathered your documents, you will need to upload the documents into the correct upload slot corresponding to each of the three document categories listed above. You will be able to upload only one file per document category.

labels.shortDescription: Former Lessee - Message 2 - Vin Eligible message Part 1
labels.value:
BEFORE PROCEEDING, PLEASE MAKE SURE YOU HAVE THE REQUIRED INFORMATION AND DOCUMENTS AVAILABLE AND READY FOR UPLOAD

As a former lessee, in addition to your name and contact information, please have the following information and documents ready before proceeding:

Information
Date that you began leasing your vehicle
Date that you surrendered your vehicle due to your lease ending
Names of any co-lessees (if applicable)

Documents
You will need to upload a scanned copy or photograph of the following supporting documentation to complete your claim:

(1) Your driver’s license or other government-issued photo identification.
Please note: federal government employee IDs, military IDs, and military dependent IDs are not acceptable and should not be uploaded.

(2) Proof of when your lease began (such as proof of first lease payment or lease agreement).

labels.shortDescription: Former Lessee - Message 2 - Vin Eligible message Part 2
labels.value:
(3) Proof of when your lease ended (such as a proof of final lease payment, lease termination agreement, or lease completion letter).

Please make sure that the scanned copy or photograph of your supporting documentation is clear and complete. If a document contains multiple pages, you must combine those pages into a single file (for example, if your lease agreement is three pages long, you must save all three pages as one combined file).

The acceptable file formats are .bmp, .gif, .jpg, .png, and .pdf, and your file size must not exceed 25 MB per document.

Once you have gathered your documents, you will need to upload the documents into the correct upload slot corresponding to each of the three document categories listed above. You will be able to upload only one file per document category.

labels.shortDescription: Current Owner - Vin Eligible message Part 2
labels.value:
carefully. The Class Long Form Notice contains additional information regarding your eligibility for settlement benefits and other important information. All claims are subject to verification.

PLEASE NOTE: To be eligible for settlement benefits as a current owner, you must continue to own your vehicle at the time that it receives the Approved Emissions Modification (“AEM”). If you sell your vehicle before completing the AEM, you will not be eligible for settlement benefits unless the vehicle is transferred to an insurance company (or otherwise sold to a junkyard, salvage dealer, or the equivalent) as a result of a total loss. For more information, please visit www.EcoDieselSettlement.com or contact Fiat Chrysler at 1-833-280-4748.

labels.shortDescription: Current Lessee - Vin Eligible message Part 1
labels.value:
This [YEAR MAKE MODEL] EcoDiesel vehicle is part of the settlement program.

Your eligibility to receive compensation depends on whether you meet the criteria described in the court approved settlement documents, which are available at EcoDieselSettlement.com. If you are eligible for the settlement, you must complete the following to receive compensation:

(1) submit the required information and documents;

(2) submit a signed oﬀer letter and signed and notarized release to Fiat Chrysler; and

(3) have the Approved Emissions Modification (“AEM”) installed in your vehicle.

labels.shortDescription: Current Lessee - Vin Eligible message Part 2
labels.value: IMPORTANT: Before submitting a claim, please read the Class Long Form Notice carefully. The Class Long Form Notice contains additional information regarding your eligibility for settlement benefits and other important information. All claims are subject to verification.

SELECT Id, OwnerId, ContactId, Owner.Type, Customer_Local_Timezone__c, Current_Local_Time__c, CC_NoOfAttempts__c, CCDL_TaskFollowUpDueTime__c, CC_CallerPostalCode__c, CC_Case_Owner__c, RecordType.DeveloperName, RecordType.Id FROM Case WHERE RecordType.DeveloperName ='eShop_RFC' AND Status = 'Open' AND ( (Owner.Type = 'Queue' AND (CCDL_TaskFollowUpDueTime__c = null OR CCDL_TaskFollowUpDueTime__c <= {0})) OR (Owner.Type = 'User' AND CC_NoOfAttempts__c = 1 AND LastModifiedDate <= {1} AND CCDL_TaskFollowUpDueTime__c > {0}) )

SELECT Id, CaseNumber, CC_CustomerProvidedVehicle__c, AssetId, CC_Market__c ,CC_SuppliedVIN__c, AccountId, ContactId FROM Case WHERE CC_LOB__c = 'CAC' AND CC_SuppliedVIN__c != null and AssetId = null and CC_Market__c = 'USA' and Origin = 'Roadside Assistance' and CC_CustomerProvidedVehicle__r.Retry_Pending__c!='False'

select id,CCDL_CaseLOB__c,CreatedDate,RecordType.Name,TaskSubtype,ActivityType__c,CC_Case_Number__c,NAFTA_Case__c,WhatId,NAFTA_Case__r.CC_ServicingDealer__c ,Subject,CC_ActivityAssignedTo__c,CreatedBy.Name FROM Task where CreatedDate >= LAST_N_YEARS:1 and NAFTA_Case__c =null and WhatId != null and What.type = 'Case' order By CreatedDate DESC limit 10000

SELECT Id, CC_VIN__c, CC_Contact__c, CC_SurveyStatus__c, CC_Contact__r.CC_LastSurveyDate__c, CC_Asset__r.CC_LastSurveyDate__c, CC_CaseNumber__c, CC_CaseNumber__r.CC_IsOwnersCustomerRetentionUBR__c, CC_CaseNumber__r.RecordType.DeveloperName, CC_LOB__c, CC_CaseNumber__r.CCDL_ContactType__c, CC_CaseNumber__r.CC_CaseDisposition__c,CC_CaseNumber__r.CC_ReopenReason__c, CC_CaseNumber__r.Reopened_due_to_Hot_Alert__c,CC_CaseNumber__r.CC_CallSurveyCompleted__c,CC_CaseNumber__r.CC_LOB__c,RecordTypeId,CC_TemplateName__c,CC_CaseNumber__r.Origin,CC_CaseNumber__r.GSDP_Chat_Survey_completed__c FROM CC_Survey__c WHERE CC_SurveyScheduledDate__c <= Today AND CC_SurveyStatus__c = 'Survey Scheduled' AND CC_CaseNumber__r.IsClosed = True AND RecordType.name = 'Get Feedback Survey'
